title: CCL - During  Call - Settings are locked
scenario: CCL settings in Device Settings > Advanced are locked and greyed out during an active call, showing a dialog that the setting cannot be adjusted, and become available again after the call ends.
steps: Start or join an active call on the device.
Observe the CCL (Call Control List) settings section.
Attempt to tap on any CCL option.
Tap the 'OK' button on the dialog.
Return to Device Settings > Advanced and check the CCL settings.
expected: During an active call, CCL settings should be locked and greyed out. Tapping any CCL option should show a dialog: "This setting cannot be adjusted when on a call". After tapping OK, the dialog should disappear and settings should remain unchanged. After ending the call, CCL settings should become available and can be changed.
